creator: bsdbugs@wynn.com
text:
Visiting ftp.freebsd.org seems to yield no ISO for the 9.x branch of FreeBSD for x86 systems.

lynx ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/ISO-IMAGES/


                                /pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/ISO-IMAGES directory
Current directory is /pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/ISO-IMAGES

   Up to i386
Mar 22  2010  Directory        7.3
Feb 20  2011  Directory        7.4
Jul 19  2010  Directory        8.1
Feb 20  2011  Directory        8.2
Apr 10  2012  Directory        8.3
Dec 19  2005  text/plain       README.TXT  1Kb

Fix: 

Put the 9.x ISO images for FreeBSD in their proper place.
How-To-Repeat: lynx ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/ISO-IMAGES/
